questions.questionText: A ray of light through (2, 1) is reflected at a point P on the y-axis and then passes through the point (5, 3). If this reflected ray is the directrix of an ellipse with eccentricity $${1 \over 3}$$ and the distance of the nearer focus from this directrix is $${8 \over {\sqrt {53} }}$$, then the equation of the other directrix can be :
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.questionText: The number of molecules in one litre of an ideal gas at 300 K and 2 atmospheric pressure with mean kinetic energy 2 $$\times$$ 10<sup>$$-$$9</sup> J per molecules is :
questions.subject: Physics

questions.questionText: For a reaction of order n, the unit of the rate constant is :
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.questionText: Let P and Q be two distinct points on a circle which has center at C(2, 3) and which passes through origin O. If OC is perpendicular to both the line segments CP and CQ, then the set {P, Q} is equal to :
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.questionText: Let $$\overrightarrow a  = \widehat i + \widehat j + 2\widehat k$$ and $$\overrightarrow b  =  - \widehat i + 2\widehat j + 3\widehat k$$. Then the vector product $$\left( {\overrightarrow a  + \overrightarrow b } \right) \times \left( {\left( {\overrightarrow a  \times \left( {\left( {\overrightarrow a  - \overrightarrow b } \right) \times \overrightarrow b } \right)} \right) \times \overrightarrow b } \right)$$ is equal to :
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.questionText:
Let S = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7}. Then the number of possible functions f : S $$\to$$ S
such that f(m . n) = f(m) . f(n) for every m, n $$\in$$ S and m . n $$\in$$ S is equal to _____________.
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.questionText:
Let C be the set of all complex numbers. Let

$${S_1} = \{ z \in C||z - 3 - 2i{|^2} = 8\} $$

$${S_2} = \{ z \in C|{\mathop{\rm Re}\nolimits} (z) \ge 5\} $$ and

$${S_3} = \{ z \in C||z - \overline z | \ge 8\} $$.

Then the number of elements in $${S_1} \cap {S_2} \cap {S_3}$$ is equal to :
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.questionText: The figure shows two solid discs with radius R and r respectively. If mass per unit area is same for both, what is the ratio of MI of bigger disc around axis AB (Which is $$ \bot $$ to the plane of the disc and passing through its centre) of MI of smaller disc around one of its diameters lying on its plane? Given 'M' is the mass of the larger disc. (MI stands for moment of inertia)
questions.subject: Physics
Mathematics

questions.questionText: Which one among the following chemical tests is used to distinguish monosaccharide from disaccharide?
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.questionText: The difference between bond orders of CO and NO$$^ \oplus $$ is $${x \over 2}$$ where x = _____________. (Round off to the Nearest Integer)
questions.subject: Chemistry
